github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: ALWAYS write the commit message in English, even when the diff contains Chinese text, comments, or identifiers. Never output Chinese characters. Follow Conventional Commits: `type(scope): summary`. Types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, chore, ci, test, perf, style. Scope is the affected module, e.g. cli, system, business, web, deploy, menu, auth, hr, radar, dependency. Summary must be imperative mood, lowercase, under 50 chars, and describe the intent of the change. Add a body (wrapped at 72 chars) only when the reasoning is not obvious from the summary.
